title: The Rebel
writer: Jean-Paul Malaquais, Jaime Salvador, Alexander Pushkin
actors: Jorge Negrete, María Elena Marqués, Julio Villarreal
plot: After a vengeance taken too far costs his father his Hacienda and his life, young Juan Manuel Mendoza becomes a bandit. He will get a chance for revenge and for love after he infiltrates his enemy house as a piano teacher.
